scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @mage2/schema && npm run build --workspace @mage2/player && npm run build --workspace @mage2/media
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @mage2/runtime-web && npm run build --workspace @mage2/editor
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.dev:editor: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @mage2/editor
scripts.dev:runtime: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @mage2/runtime-web
scripts.package:editor:win: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @mage2/runtime-web && npm run build --workspace @mage2/editor && node scripts/package-editor-win.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @mage2/editor && npm run typecheck --workspace @mage2/runtime-web
